title: Smub's Shrimps
description: Adds a few variations of shrimps to your funny block game
body:
This Mod adds shrimp to silly block game. i have plans to add more later but this is what i wanted to put out for now

 

Shrimp Variants:

-Shrimp

-Mantis Shrimp

-Cherry Shrimp

-Caridean Shrimp

-Giant Tiger Prawn

-Blue TIger Shrimp

 

Foods

-Shrimp sandwich

-Rice bowl

-Shrimp Sushi

-Cooked Shrimp

IF you just want to see what it actually is before you download heres the link to my video:[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cdm5P5eL3gY](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cdm5P5eL3gY)
